scripts.build: npm run clean && tsc -p tsconfig.main.json && node scripts/build-renderer.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=require('path');['index.html','styles.css','copilot.png'].forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync(p.join('src','renderer',f),p.join('dist','renderer',f)))"
scripts.rebuild:electron: node -e "const v=require('electron/package.json').version; const fs=require('fs'); const p=require('path'); const marker=p.join('node_modules','better-sqlite3','.electron-target'); if(fs.existsSync(marker)&&fs.readFileSync(marker,'utf8')===v+'_'+process.arch){console.log('[rebuild] better-sqlite3 already built for Electron '+v+', skipping');process.exit(0)} const {execSync}=require('child_process'); process.stdout.write('[rebuild] Rebuilding better-sqlite3 for Electron '+v+'...'); execSync('npx --yes node-gyp rebuild --target='+v+' --arch='+process.arch+' --dist-url=https://electronjs.org/headers --runtime=electron', {cwd:'node_modules/better-sqlite3', stdio:'pipe'}); fs.writeFileSync(marker,v+'_'+process.arch); console.log(' done')"
scripts.rebuild:node: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const cp=require('child_process');const m=require('path').join('node_modules','better-sqlite3','.electron-target');try{if(fs.existsSync(m))fs.unlinkSync(m)}catch(e){console.warn('[rebuild:node] unlink marker:',e.message)}try{cp.execSync('npm rebuild better-sqlite3',{stdio:'pipe'})}catch(e){console.warn('[rebuild:node] rebuild failed (likely a running Electron app holding better_sqlite3.node — stop it and re-run): '+(e.stderr?.toString()||e.message).split('\n').slice(0,3).join(' '))}"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && electron .
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && (tsc -p tsconfig.main.json -w --preserveWatchOutput --declaration false --sourceMap false & node scripts/build-renderer.js --watch & node scripts/watch-assets.js & electronmon .)
scripts.dev:packaged: npm run build:mac && open build/mac-arm64/Copilot\ Whim.app
scripts.build:mac: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && electron-builder --mac --dir
scripts.build:installer:mac: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && electron-builder --mac
scripts.build:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && electron-builder --win --dir
scripts.build:installer:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && electron-builder --win
scripts.release: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && electron-builder --mac --publish always
scripts.release:win: npm run build && npm run rebuild:electron && electron-builder --win --publish always

extendInfo.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Copilot Whim needs microphone access for voice input.
